sql: SELECT u.email, SUM(f.profit) AS total_profit FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id GROUP BY u.email ORDER BY total_profit DESC LIMIT 10;

sql: SELECT name, email FROM dim_users WHERE signup_date > '2024-09-01';

question: Query the emails of the top 88 customers by total earnings.
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT u.email, SUM(f.profit) AS total_profit FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id GROUP BY u.email ORDER BY total_profit DESC LIMIT 88;

question: Can you tell me the total top line generated from 2023-07-29.
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT SUM(revenue) FROM fact_sales WHERE sale_timestamp >= '2023-07-29';

question: The names of products that cost less than 1302 dollars.
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT product_name FROM dim_products WHERE unit_price < 1302;

question: The top 1 product categories that sold the most units.
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(f.quantity) AS total_sold FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_sold DESC LIMIT 1;
